nasb.text: This is again a second sign that Jesus performed when He had come out of Judea into Galilee.

esv.text: This was now the second sign that Jesus did when he had come from Judea to Galilee.

cnv.text: 這是耶穌從猶太回到加利利以後所行的第二件神蹟。

ccb.text: 这是耶稣从犹太回到加利利后所行的第二个神迹。

csbs.text: 这是耶稣从犹太回到加利利以后所行的第二件神迹。
